mnemonics.title: AH vs ESP Services
mnemonics.content: AH = Authentication & Integrity, ESP = Encryption, Authentication & Integrity (Remember: ESP has the E for Encryption)

mnemonics.title: Protocol Numbers
mnemonics.content: AH is 51 (5+1=6, Authentication has 13 letters, 1+3=4, not helpful) - Better: A comes before E in alphabet, AH=51, ESP=50 (smaller number)

mnemonics.title: IKE Phases
mnemonics.content: Phase 1: Secure Channel Setup (1 channel), Phase 2: SA Establishment (2 SAs for bidirectional communication)
